title: Barge-in and mid-sentence topic switch
goal: Test Athena's barge-in handling by cutting her off mid-sentence to redirect the conversation, then switching topics a second time. Observe whether she adapts to the new topic or resumes her previous turn.
opening_line: Yeah hi — actually, before anything else, I need to ask about my prescription.
must_test: Whether Athena stops speaking when the patient talks over her and processes the new input
Whether Athena picks up on the interrupting content rather than replaying her previous response
Whether multiple interruptions in sequence cause Athena to loop or lose context
Whether Athena remains helpful and does not become robotic or repetitive after being cut off
Whether Athena handles a mid-sentence topic switch gracefully
expected_agent_behaviour: Agent should pause when interrupted and address the new topic raised
Agent should not repeat the sentence that was interrupted from the beginning
Agent should track context correctly across interruptions — not forget what was established before
Agent should remain natural and conversational in tone throughout
Agent should recover and complete the task even after two interruptions
escalation_steps: Start with the prescription question — if Athena begins a long response, cut in after her first sentence with: actually wait, I also need to check on my appointment
If Athena starts explaining the appointment, cut in again with: you know what, let me just reschedule it to next Monday morning
If Athena handles both interruptions and moves to reschedule, cooperate and complete the reschedule
If Athena gets confused or repeats herself after an interruption, note the specific exchange and how many turns it took to recover
If Athena confirms identity by phone, confirm you are James and provide DOB if asked

extra.watch_for: The ConversationRelay interruptible flag is set to true in the TwiML. This scenario tests whether that is working as intended at the Athena level, not just the infrastructure level. A well-tuned agent should handle two sequential barge-ins without losing the thread.
extra.known_athena_behaviour: Athena's silence timeout from the test line is around 15-20 seconds. Interruptions that cause her to restart from scratch will waste time and risk triggering that timeout.
